original: Clothing can do more than protect! It can highlight the best parts of one’s physical form with form-fitting fabric and deliberately exposed cut-outs! Thanks to the lightweight construction and elastic material, this virgin-slayer sweater can make it seem even easier to move around - and look great doing it! Buy yours today!\n\nA Tamani-Corp product.
